change.purpose: Verify downloaded exact-commit environment-preflight artifacts before treating repository declarations as dispatch-ready.

verified_by_inspection: SHA-256 comparison is required for checkout, workflow-contract, and preflight-evidence files.
Repository and commit must agree across caller expectation, checkout proof, run manifest, and evidence packet.
Workflow contract must be valid and evidence must be ready_for_dispatch.
Run provenance fields must be present.
Forbidden secret-value field names fail closed.
claim_boundary: This verifier can authenticate artifact integrity and exact-commit repository declaration readiness. It does not verify secret installation, Cloudflare authorization, deployment, hostname resolution, served content, or scientific or medical truth.
privacy_boundary: No credential values, private chat, health information, or identifying personal material are read, emitted, or committed.
next_action: Run the exact-commit preflight workflow, download its artifact, execute this verifier against the triggering repository and SHA, then retain the verdict before dispatching the deployment workflow.
